name: Intel VTune Profiler
description: Installs Intel VTune Profiler via the official Intel oneAPI APT repository

version.description: Version of intel-oneapi-vtune to install (e.g. '2025.9.0' or 'latest')

gui.description: Install VTune GUI components. Requires DISPLAY forwarded into the container.

sampling_drivers.description: Install Intel sampling drivers (intel-oneapi-vtune-devel) for hardware PMU-based profiling. Requires SYS_ADMIN capability and access to /proc/sys/kernel/perf_event_paranoid on the host.

self_check.description: Run vtune-self-checker.sh after installation to validate the VTune setup.
